questions.question: A gamer scored $85$ points in a game, but then lost $15\%$ of them. How many points did the gamer lose?
A new smartphone model has a $25\%$ increase in battery life compared to the previous model. If the previous model had a battery life of $12$ hours, what is the battery life of the new model?
A gamer's high score is $10,000$ points. If the high score is reduced by $20\%$, what is the new high score?
The price of a gaming console increases by $8\%$ due to tariffs. If the original price was $$400$, what is the new price?
A data plan has a $15\%$ discount for students. If the original price is $$50$ per month, how much will a student pay?
A gamer's favorite game has a $30\%$ off sale. If the original price was $$60$, how much will the gamer pay during the sale?
The number of players in an online game decreased by $18\%$ last month. If there were originally $500$ players, how many players are left?
The price of a gaming headset increased by $22\%$. If the original price was $$80$, what is the new price?
A tech company has $480$ employees. If the company plans to increase its staff by $12\%$, how many new employees will be hired?
A gamer scored $75$ points in the first round and $90$ points in the second round. What is the percent increase in points from round 1 to round 2?

teacher_rules: Tip 1: Make sure to calculate percentages carefully
Tip 2: Read each question thoroughly before answering
Tip 3: Use the given information to solve problems
